title: Prisoner's Dilemma Payoff Matrix
description: A visual representation of the strategic choices and payoffs for two players in the classic Prisoner's Dilemma game. It shows the outcomes for both players based on their simultaneous decisions to cooperate or defect.
relationships: Player A's choice determines the row
Player B's choice determines the column
The intersection shows the outcome for both players
Defecting against a cooperator gives the best individual outcome but worst for the cooperator
